<style>
    :host{
        --app-bar-surface:var(--primary-color,#172238);
        --app-bar-text:var(--button-text-color,#fff);
        --app-bar-accent:var(--secondary-color,#c49a52);
        --app-bar-active-text:var(--text-color,#fff);
        --app-bar-border:var(--border-color,rgba(255,255,255,.18));
        box-sizing:border-box;
        display:block;
        min-width:0;
        color:var(--app-bar-text);
    }

    *,*::before,*::after{
        box-sizing:border-box;
    }

    nav{
        display:flex;
        align-items:center;
        gap:clamp(.7rem,2vw,1.5rem);
        min-width:0;
        min-height:4.25rem;
        padding:.55rem clamp(.7rem,2vw,1.4rem);
        color:inherit;
        background:var(--app-bar-surface);
        border-bottom:1px solid var(--app-bar-accent);
        box-shadow:0 .35rem 1.1rem var(--shadow-color,rgba(0,0,0,.18));
    }

    .brand{
        display:flex;
        flex:0 0 auto;
        align-items:center;
        gap:.65rem;
        min-width:0;
        color:inherit;
        text-decoration:none;
    }

    .brand-mark{
        display:grid;
        place-items:center;
        width:2.45rem;
        height:2.45rem;
        overflow:hidden;
        border:1px solid color-mix(in srgb,var(--app-bar-accent) 74%,white);
        border-radius:.5rem;
        color:var(--app-bar-active-text);
        background:var(--app-bar-accent);
        font:800 1.15rem/1 system-ui,sans-serif;
    }

    .product-name{
        overflow:hidden;
        font:750 .98rem/1.15 system-ui,sans-serif;
        letter-spacing:.035em;
        text-overflow:ellipsis;
        white-space:nowrap;
    }

    .routes{
        flex:1 1 auto;
        min-width:0;
        overflow-x:auto;
        scrollbar-width:thin;
    }

    #navigationSlot,
    #generatedNavigation{
        display:flex;
        align-items:center;
        justify-content:center;
        gap:.18rem;
        min-width:max-content;
    }

    #generatedNavigation:empty{
        display:none;
    }

    #generatedNavigation a,
    ::slotted([slot="navigation"]){
        display:block;
        border:1px solid transparent;
        border-radius:.5rem;
        padding:.62rem .72rem;
        color:inherit;
        background:transparent;
        font:680 .8rem/1 system-ui,sans-serif;
        text-decoration:none;
        white-space:nowrap;
    }

    #generatedNavigation a:hover,
    #generatedNavigation a[aria-current="page"],
    ::slotted([slot="navigation"]:hover),
    ::slotted([slot="navigation"][aria-current="page"]){
        color:var(--app-bar-active-text);
        background:var(--app-bar-accent);
        border-color:color-mix(in srgb,var(--app-bar-accent) 65%,white);
    }

    a:focus-visible,
    ::slotted([slot="navigation"]:focus-visible),
    ::slotted([slot="trailing"]:focus-visible){
        outline:.18rem solid var(--focus-color,var(--app-bar-accent));
        outline-offset:.14rem;
    }

    @media(forced-colors:active){
        .brand-mark,
        #generatedNavigation a:hover,
        #generatedNavigation a[aria-current="page"],
        ::slotted([slot="navigation"]:hover),
        ::slotted([slot="navigation"][aria-current="page"]){
            background:Highlight;
            border-color:Highlight;
            color:HighlightText;
            forced-color-adjust:auto;
        }
    }

    .end{
        display:flex;
        flex:0 0 auto;
        align-items:center;
        gap:.55rem;
        min-width:0;
    }

    .status{
        display:flex;
        align-items:center;
        gap:.42rem;
        min-width:0;
        color:color-mix(in srgb,var(--app-bar-text) 82%,transparent);
        font:650 .72rem/1.2 system-ui,sans-serif;
    }

    .status-dot{
        width:.5rem;
        height:.5rem;
        flex:0 0 auto;
        border-radius:50%;
        background:var(--app-bar-status-color,var(--app-bar-accent));
        box-shadow:0 0 0 .16rem color-mix(in srgb,var(--app-bar-status-color,var(--app-bar-accent)) 20%,transparent);
    }

    :host([data-status-tone="success"]) .status{--app-bar-status-color:var(--success-color,#4f9a6b)}
    :host([data-status-tone="warning"]) .status{--app-bar-status-color:var(--warning-color,#d69a32)}
    :host([data-status-tone="error"]) .status{--app-bar-status-color:var(--danger-color,#c64c43)}
    :host([data-status-tone="muted"]) .status{--app-bar-status-color:var(--app-bar-border)}
    :host(:not([data-status])) #defaultStatus{display:none}

    #defaultStatus{
        display:flex;
        align-items:center;
        gap:.42rem;
    }

    .trailing{
        display:flex;
        align-items:center;
        gap:.4rem;
    }

    @media(max-width:48rem){
        nav{
            flex-wrap:wrap;
            gap:.45rem .75rem;
            padding:.55rem .7rem;
        }

        .brand{
            flex:1 1 auto;
        }

        .routes{
            order:3;
            flex-basis:100%;
        }

        #generatedNavigation{
            justify-content:flex-start;
        }
    }

    @media(max-width:30rem){
        .product-name{
            max-width:9rem;
        }

        .status-text{
            max-width:6rem;
            overflow:hidden;
            text-overflow:ellipsis;
            white-space:nowrap;
        }
    }
</style>

<nav aria-label="Primary navigation" part="nav">
    <a class="brand" id="brandLink" href="./" part="brand">
        <span class="brand-mark" part="brand-mark"><slot name="brand-mark"><span id="defaultBrandMark">A</span></slot></span>
        <span class="product-name" part="product-name"><slot name="product-name"><span id="defaultProductName">Application</span></slot></span>
    </a>

    <div class="routes" part="routes">
        <slot name="navigation" id="navigationSlot"><div id="generatedNavigation"></div></slot>
    </div>

    <div class="end" part="end">
        <div class="status" role="status" aria-live="polite" part="status">
            <slot name="status">
                <span id="defaultStatus">
                    <span class="status-dot" aria-hidden="true"></span>
                    <span class="status-text" id="statusText"></span>
                </span>
            </slot>
        </div>
        <div class="trailing" part="trailing"><slot name="trailing"></slot></div>
    </div>
</nav>

<script type="module">
    const host=this;
    const root=host.shadowRoot;
    const nav=root.querySelector('nav');
    const brandLink=root.querySelector('#brandLink');
    const navigationSlot=root.querySelector('#navigationSlot');
    const generatedNavigation=root.querySelector('#generatedNavigation');
    const statusText=root.querySelector('#statusText');
    const statusTones=new Set(['default','success','warning','error','muted']);

    let navigation=[];

    host.setNavigation=setNavigation;
    host.setActiveRoute=setActiveRoute;
    host.setStatus=setStatus;
    host.refresh=refresh;

    Object.defineProperties(
        host,
        {
            activeRoute:{
                configurable:true,
                get:()=>host.getAttribute('data-active-route')||routeFromLocation(),
                set:value=>setActiveRoute(value)
            },
            navigation:{
                configurable:true,
                get:()=>navigation.slice(),
                set:value=>setNavigation(value)
            },
            status:{
                configurable:true,
                get:()=>host.getAttribute('data-status')||'',
                set:value=>setStatus(value,host.getAttribute('data-status-tone')||'default')
            }
        }
    );

    navigationSlot.addEventListener('slotchange',updateCurrent);
    window.addEventListener('hashchange',onLocationChange);
    window.addEventListener('popstate',onLocationChange);

    const observer=new MutationObserver(
        records=>{
            const attributes=new Set(records.map(record=>record.attributeName));

            if(attributes.has('data-brand-mark')||attributes.has('data-product-name')||attributes.has('data-brand-href')||attributes.has('data-label')){
                syncBrand();
            }
            if(attributes.has('data-active-route')){
                updateCurrent();
            }
            if(attributes.has('data-status')||attributes.has('data-status-tone')){
                syncStatus();
            }
            if(attributes.has('data-navigation')){
                readNavigationAttribute();
            }
        }
    );

    observer.observe(
        host,
        {
            attributes:true,
            attributeFilter:['data-brand-mark','data-product-name','data-brand-href','data-label','data-active-route','data-status','data-status-tone','data-navigation']
        }
    );

    function syncBrand(){
        root.querySelector('#defaultBrandMark').textContent=host.dataset.brandMark||'A';
        root.querySelector('#defaultProductName').textContent=host.dataset.productName||'Application';
        brandLink.href=host.dataset.brandHref||'./';
        nav.setAttribute('aria-label',host.dataset.label||'Primary navigation');
    }

    function normalizeNavigation(items=[]){
        if(!Array.isArray(items)){
            return [];
        }

        return items.filter(item=>item&&typeof item==='object').map(
            item=>({
                label:String(item.label||item.name||item.route||''),
                href:String(item.href||'#'),
                route:String(item.route||item.id||'')
            })
        ).filter(item=>item.label);
    }

    function setNavigation(items=[]){
        navigation=normalizeNavigation(items);
        generatedNavigation.replaceChildren(
            ...navigation.map(
                item=>{
                    const link=document.createElement('a');
                    link.textContent=item.label;
                    link.href=item.href;
                    if(item.route){
                        link.dataset.route=item.route;
                    }
                    return link;
                }
            )
        );
        updateCurrent();
        return navigation.slice();
    }

    function readNavigationAttribute(){
        const source=host.getAttribute('data-navigation');

        if(!source){
            if(navigation.length){
                setNavigation([]);
            }
            return;
        }

        try{
            setNavigation(JSON.parse(source));
        }catch(error){
            console.warn('Unable to parse app-bar data-navigation.',error);
            setNavigation([]);
        }
    }

    function routeFromLocation(){
        const hash=globalThis.location?.hash?.replace(/^#/,'');
        return hash||globalThis.location?.pathname||'';
    }

    function routeForLink(link){
        if(link.dataset.route){
            return link.dataset.route;
        }
        if(link.dataset.view){
            return link.dataset.view;
        }

        try{
            const url=new URL(link.href,globalThis.location?.href||'http://localhost/');
            return url.hash.replace(/^#/,'')||url.pathname;
        }catch{
            return link.getAttribute('href')||'';
        }
    }

    function navigationLinks(){
        const assigned=navigationSlot.assignedElements({flatten:true});
        const roots=assigned.length?assigned:[generatedNavigation];
        const links=[];

        roots.forEach(element=>{
            if(element.matches?.('a[href],[data-route],[data-view]')){
                links.push(element);
            }
            links.push(...element.querySelectorAll('a[href],[data-route],[data-view]'));
        });

        return [...new Set(links)];
    }

    function setActiveRoute(route=''){
        if(route){
            host.setAttribute('data-active-route',String(route).replace(/^#/,''));
        }else{
            host.removeAttribute('data-active-route');
        }
        updateCurrent();
        return host.activeRoute;
    }

    function updateCurrent(){
        const current=String(host.activeRoute||'').replace(/^#/,'');

        navigationLinks().forEach(link=>{
            const active=routeForLink(link).replace(/^#/,'')===current;
            if(active){
                link.setAttribute('aria-current','page');
            }else{
                link.removeAttribute('aria-current');
            }
        });
    }

    function onLocationChange(){
        if(!host.hasAttribute('data-active-route')){
            updateCurrent();
        }
    }

    function setStatus(message='',tone='default'){
        if(message===null||message===''){
            host.removeAttribute('data-status');
        }else{
            host.setAttribute('data-status',String(message));
        }
        host.setAttribute('data-status-tone',statusTones.has(tone)?tone:'default');
        syncStatus();
        return host.status;
    }

    function syncStatus(){
        statusText.textContent=host.dataset.status||'';
        const tone=statusTones.has(host.dataset.statusTone)?host.dataset.statusTone:'default';
        if(host.dataset.statusTone!==tone){
            host.dataset.statusTone=tone;
        }
    }

    function refresh(){
        syncBrand();
        syncStatus();
        updateCurrent();
        return host;
    }

    syncBrand();
    syncStatus();
    readNavigationAttribute();
    updateCurrent();

    host.ready=true;
    host.dispatchEvent(
        new CustomEvent(
            'app-bar-ready',
            {
                detail:{appBar:host},
                bubbles:true,
                composed:true
            }
        )
    );
</script>
